ogTitle: Cooroo Lands vs Cooroy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooroo Lands and Cooroy.
heading: Cooroo Lands vs Cooroy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooroo Lands, Queensland and Cooroy, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooroo Lands has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Cooroy (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooroo Lands or Cooroy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooroo Lands has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Cooroy scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooroo Lands scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Cooroy scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooroo Lands or Cooroy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooroo Lands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
